title: Page bridge accepts unbounded forged event payloads
source: Any MAIN-world script executing on a matching TikTok page can reproduce the public postMessage marker.
control: Same-window and same-origin checks plus a public marker route data but do not authenticate the sender; collection counts are capped but item and byte sizes are not.
sink: Structured-clone forwarding and whole-state writes to chrome.storage.session.
impact: Same-tab state spoofing and extension CPU, memory, or session-storage exhaustion.

title: Compressed WebSocket payloads have no decompressed-size or concurrency bound
source: A TikTok-controlled WebSocket endpoint or same-page script able to create a WebSocket and supply binary frames.
control: Frames above 16 MiB compressed size are skipped, but decompressed output, aggregate bytes and concurrent decodes are unbounded.
sink: DecompressionStream consumed by Response.arrayBuffer followed by protobuf parsing.
impact: Tab-scoped CPU and memory exhaustion and loss of Companion availability.
